Request a Demo

Inaccessible Asset Monitoring

Your most critical assets are the ones no sensor can reach. They're already telling you what's wrong.

SAM4 reads electrical signatures at the motor control cabinet and monitors every AC motor 24/7. No sensors on the machine. No access to the asset.

Request a Demo See How ESA Works
[Hero image: industrial engineer at MCC cabinet, or SAM4 dashboard showing real asset health data and spectral graph]

Built for the people who keep plants running

SAM4 serves different roles in the maintenance and reliability chain. Find your question.

Reliability Manager
Does this solve a problem I can't solve today?
You know 30-40% of your assets are blind. Vibration can't reach submerged pumps or ATEX zones. ESA monitors from the MCC, covering the assets sensors can't.
See the technology → Operations Director
What's the financial impact and how fast?
Yorkshire Water: 70,000 inspection trips replaced. DuPont: 40% reduction in equipment downtime. Average payback: 8 months.
See the results → Maintenance Engineer
Will this make my job easier or harder?
Install in under 30 minutes per asset. No shutdown. Actionable alerts with severity scoring and recommended actions. Integrates with SAP PM and IBM Maximo.
See how it installs →

The Technology

How ESA works

Every AC motor draws a unique current and voltage signature. When a bearing degrades, a coupling misaligns, or cavitation develops, the signature changes. SAM4 captures these changes at the motor control cabinet and diagnoses the fault before failure.

[Diagram: MCC cabinet with split-core CTs → signal flow → cloud processing → SAM4 dashboard with health scores and spectral analysis]
1
Signal capture
Split-core CTs clip onto cables at the MCC. Current and voltage sampled at high frequency.
2
Pattern analysis
Spectral decomposition isolates frequency components linked to mechanical and electrical faults.
3
AI classification
Machine learning models trained on thousands of confirmed faults identify anomalies and diagnose root cause.
4
Expert validation
Samotics reliability engineers review alerts before they reach your team. 0.32% false positive rate.
Learn the technical detail behind ESA →
No sensors on the machine
Monitors from the MCC. Submerged pumps, ATEX zones, enclosed drives — all reachable. No permits, no scaffolding, no shutdown.
Install in under 30 minutes
Current and voltage sensors clip onto existing cables at the motor control cabinet. No production interruption. No asset downtime.
90.8%
Fault detection rate on core assets
Bearing wear, imbalance, cavitation, misalignment. Detected weeks to months before failure. 1,874 resolved incidents. Jan 2024 to Feb 2026.

The assets SAM4 monitors

Every AC-motor-driven asset is a candidate. These are the ones where ESA has the strongest track record.

Pumps
Bearing failure · Cavitation · Impeller wear · Dry running · Seal degradation
1,000+ pumping stations monitored. Bearing faults detected weeks before failure on submerged assets no vibration sensor can reach.
Yorkshire Water, Vitens, ArcelorMittal
See pump detections →
Fans & Blowers
Bearing failure · Blade imbalance · Blade erosion
100% detection accuracy at Schiphol Airport. 9 out of 9 failures caught — including faults vibration monitoring missed.
Schiphol Airport
See fan detections →
Conveyors
Gearbox degradation · Belt slip · Drive-end bearing failure
Included in 90.8% fault detection rate across 1,874 resolved incidents. Gearbox tooth defects detected via gear mesh frequency analysis.
Metals & mining deployments
See conveyor detections →
ESPs
Bearing failure · Shaft wear · Gas locking · Electrical insulation breakdown
Electrical Submersible Pumps operate kilometres underground with zero physical access. ESA monitors the full drivetrain from the surface switchgear.
Oil & Gas deployments
See ESP detections →
Archimedes Screws
Bearing failure · Gearbox degradation · Drive misalignment
Slow-speed, high-torque drives in inlet works and storm tanks. Bearing and gearbox faults detected months before failure on assets with no vibration access.
Water & Wastewater deployments
See screw detections →
More assets
Crushers · Mixers · Agitators · Cooling towers · Compressors · Any AC motor
Every AC-motor-driven asset is a candidate for ESA monitoring. See the full detection matrix by asset type and fault mode.
Full detection coverage
